Apple (AAPL) Q3 2024 Earnings Call Transcript

Prepared Remarks

Tim Cook -- Chief Executive Officer

Good afternoon, everyone, and thanks for joining us. Today we are reporting a June quarter revenue record of $85.8 billion.

Luca Maestri -- Chief Financial Officer

Thank you, Tim. Our services business set a new all-time revenue record.

Questions & Answers

Analyst: Can you talk about iPad demand?

Tim Cook: iPad had a great quarter, up 24% year over year.
